name: get_block
content:
API response times shall
not exceed 200ms at the 95th percentile under normal load conditions
(defined as 5000 concurrent users).

function.name: patch_block
function.arguments: {"id":"req-8","content":"API response times shall\nnot exceed 150ms at the 95th percentile under normal load conditions\n(defined as 5000 concurrent users)."}

content: Updated req-8: the API response time threshold is now 150ms (was 200ms). The rest of the requirement is unchanged.
